debtor_panel_navigation: ui.openDebtorList now finalizes with normalizeSelection: false so explicit list navigation preserves null selection
api-level debtor detail renderer now requires debtorPanel.mode === detail before rendering
debtorDetail DOM wrapper and completion hook now ignore non-detail panel mode to prevent list-to-detail rebound

notes: Static syntax checks passed for modified JS files.
This patch targets the debtor panel back-navigation rebound bug discovered in real usage.
